title: Certains comparisons between UUID produce a MAL error
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, uuid_col CHAR(36) NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(255));
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE NOT (uuid_col = '123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174001' AND name IS NOT NULL);
key_bug_features: Comparisons between UUIDs produce MAL error
